summary: Build now passes cleanly. Fixed 2 esbuild errors: (1) created stub router files for server/api/routers/pipelines.ts and server/api/routers/ghlAutomation.ts which were imported in routers.ts but never created, (2) removed duplicate ghlAutomationRouter import. Vite client build produces all assets to dist/public/. esbuild server build produces dist/index.js. vercel.json and api/index.ts serverless wrapper are correctly configured. Health endpoint at /api/health returns JSON. App is build-ready for Vercel deployment.

commits.message: fix(deploy): add missing pipelines and ghlAutomation router stubs, remove duplicate import

notes.vercel_config: vercel.json routes /api/* to api/index.ts serverless function, all other routes to index.html SPA
notes.env_vars_needed: DATABASE_URL, SUPABASE_*, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, GOOGLE_GEMINI_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, BROWSERBASE_*, STRIPE_*, JWT_SECRET, SESSION_SECRET, SENTRY_DSN, REDIS_URL, AWS_*, VAPI_API_KEY
